required_actions: Confirm framework conventions and route ownership.
Validate auth/session behavior before target generation.
Parameterize or replace inline SQL during migration.
Deep-scan the top PHP hotspot controllers/models before handing off to Architect.
Resolve dual-datastore ownership if multiple operational databases are present.

	class Contractor_placement_hr_checklist_detailsSearchController extends SearchController
	{

		{
			$this->modelname        = 'Contractor_placement_hr_checklist_detailsSearch';
			parent::__construct();
			$this->baseurl         .= '/contractor_placement_hr_checklist_details';
			$this->defaultFormlabel = 'Contractor Placement HR Checklist Options';
			$this->defaultHeadline  = 'Contractor Placement HR Checklist';
		}

		{
			return [];
		}

		{
			return parent::run($request, true);
		}

		protected function search()
		{
			global $db_connection;

			$q = "
				SELECT cphcm.contractor_placement_id           contractor_placement_id,
				       cphcm.onb_hr_checklist_type_id          onb_hr_checklist_type_id,
				       cp.name                                 placement,
				       ohct.name                               onb_hr_checklist_type,
				       cphcm.completion_date                   completion_date
				  FROM (contractor_placement_hr_checklist_details_map cphcm, contractor_placement cp, onb_hr_checklist_type ohct)
				 WHERE cphcm.contractor_placement_id  = cp.id
				   AND cphcm.onb_hr_checklist_type_id = ohct.id
				   AND cphcm.is_active                = 'Y'
				   AND cphcm.is_customer_mapped       = 'Y'
				 ORDER BY cphcm.contractor_placement_id DESC
			";

			$this->model->data = db_get_rows($q, $db_connection);
			return count($this->model->data);
		}

<?php

	class Contractor_placement_hr_checklist_detailsSearchController extends SearchController
	{
		public function __construct()
		{
			$this->modelname        = 'Contractor_placement_hr_checklist_detailsSearch';
			parent::__construct();
			$this->baseurl         .= '/contractor_placement_hr_checklist_details';
			$this->defaultFormlabel = 'Contractor Placement HR Checklist Options';
			$this->defaultHeadline  = 'Contractor Placement HR Checklist';
		}

		protected function links()
		{
			return [];
		}

		protected function run($request, $perform = false)
		{
			return parent::run($request, true);
		}

		protected function search()
		{
			global $db_connection;

			$q = "
				SELECT cphcm.contractor_placement_id           contractor_placement_id,
				       cphcm.onb_hr_checklist_type_id          onb_hr_checklist_type_id,
				       cp.name                                 placement,
				       ohct.name                               onb_hr_checklist_type,
				       cphcm.completion_date                   completion_date
				  FROM (contractor_placement_hr_checklist_details_map cphcm, contractor_placement cp, onb_hr_checklist_type ohct)
				 WHERE cphcm.contractor_placement_id  = cp.id
				   AND cphcm.onb_hr_checklist_type_id = ohct.id
				   AND cphcm.is_active                = 'Y'
				   AND cphcm.is_customer_mapped       = 'Y'
				 ORDER BY cphcm.contractor_placement_id DESC
			";

			$this->model->data = db_get_rows($q, $db_connection);
			return count($this->model->data);
		}

		protected function label()
		{
			// Display, th style, td style, sum, transform, link, field to attached to link
			$this->model->label = [
